name: Florelle Eau de Parfum
short: An opulent floral bouquet eau de parfum that captivates with rich, sophisticated notes.
description: Florelle is an opulent floral bouquet eau de parfum that opens with a bright flash of bergamot and pink pepper, blooms into a lush heart of rose, jasmine, and tuberose, and settles into a warm, powdery base of iris, musk, and sandalwood. Composed at high concentration for a rich, captivating sillage. Hand-filled and finished in our Udaipur atelier, each 50ml flacon is weighted with a brass-tone cap. For those who believe a fragrance should leave a trail.
benefits: Opulent floral bouquet with rose, jasmine, and tuberose
High concentration for bold, lasting sillage
Weighted glass flacon with brass-tone cap
usage: Spritz onto pulse points — wrists, neck, behind the ears — from a distance of 6 inches. Do not rub. Reapply as desired. A statement scent for evenings and special occasions.
